name: VideoVault Premiere Extension
releaseNotes:
- Cut a fresh extension minor release for the new branch-based Windows and macOS publishing flow.
- Added versioned markdown release notes for extension releases.
- Preserved the current background bridge and panel-closed activity capture path.
- Bumped the extension bundle version to `1.4.0`.
- Kept the background extension entry active so telemetry can continue even when the visible panel is not open.
- Continued packaging the standard Windows zip and macOS pkg outputs expected by the desktop updater.
- Added the `1.4.0` release note file as the source of truth for this extension release.
- The extension release workflows now use this markdown file for both the GitHub Release body and updater-facing release notes.
